prompt: Add ghost notes to the snare — very quiet hits between the main snare hits.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65

  ch 2 Bass
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 48 52 55

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _x _x _x _x x _x x x _x x _x _x x _x x x
    v 0 0 0 0 110 0 30 25 0 35 0 0 110 0 25 20
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

sec chorus
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 65 67 69 72

  ch 2 Bass
    p q q _q q
    n 36

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 53 57 60

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _x _x _x _x x _x x x _x x _x _x x _x x x
    v 0 0 0 0 110 0 30 25 0 35 0 0 110 0 25 20
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI correctly added 16th note ghost notes to the snare pattern and attempted to set their velocities to 20-30.
judgment.quality_reason: The velocity array includes 0s for rests, which in BIRD syntax misaligns the values (rests do not consume list items), resulting in the first several snare hits (including the main hit on beat 2) having a velocity of 0.
